summary: Derek is home in Minnesota after a week in Bellingham (Cascadia magazine) and a train ride on the Empire Builder. Being Claude #13 (The Dimmer Switch) just published. The Kitchen TUI is live at /kitchen. 13 Being Claude essays published. Lightning/Bug film targeting Runway AI Festival April 20. The book Claude Will. comes out June 28. Derek writes, makes films, and builds language models. He occasionally consults for media organizations that interest him.
